summary: color-style-utils ships postinstall script that exfiltrates host data and spawns child processes
details: The package's postinstall.js executes on install (npm preinstall/postinstall lifecycle) and combines child_process invocation with HTTP requests carrying host identity data. postinstall.js line 5 requires child_process; lines 20, 46, 287, 409, and 427 collect hostname information; lines 22, 48, and 425+ perform GET and POST requests via http.request. A package advertised as a color/style utility has no legitimate need to spawn subprocesses or beacon host details from a postinstall hook. The shape — install-time network I/O combined with system-data collection and process execution — matches the active-attack fingerprint of an installer-side exfiltration and dropper.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
